## Problem Statement
[Is your feature request related to a problem? Provide a clear and concise description of what the problem is. Example: "I am always frustrated when..."]

## Proposed Solution
[Provide a clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Detail how this feature will resolve the problem mentioned above.]

## Alternative Solutions Considered
[Provide a clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered.]

## UI / UX Considerations
[Describe any visual changes required. Use text brackets to specify interactive elements, such as adding a [Submit] button or an [Edit] label to a specific component.]

## Additional Context
[Add any other context or links to related discussions here.]

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this feature has not already been requested.
- [ ] I have clearly defined the problem and the proposed solution.
